locator.quote: every aggressive bet automatically generates a paired passive order on the opposite side

text: In scalping mode every aggressive bet automatically generates a paired passive order on the opposite side of the same runner.

locator.quote: the action space is too large for the agent to stumble into arb behaviour spontaneously

text: The pairing is forced (not discovered) because the action space is too large for the agent to stumble into arb behaviour spontaneously.

locator.quote: The agent must learn this price-dependent breakeven

text: The commission breakeven is price-dependent (a tick is worth ~£0.02/£10 at low prices, ~£0.50/£10 at high) and the agent must learn this price-dependent breakeven.
